creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #1)

> Do you want to create a patch for it? …

Since I looked for the first time at mdoc(7) <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=mdoc&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD>, I'm certain that I'll not get my head around a language such as this in the near future.
